commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Fixed ground track and planet map exporter breaking since the procedural modifier refactoring.
Fixed various gradient accumulation issues in the procedural modifiers shader.
Fixed planet map exporter appearing in a window underneath the terrain debug window.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Changed VehicleEditor, translate/rotate/scale gizmos now operate mutually exclusive. Gizmos now operate on placed parts rather than grabbed parts. TODO: gizmos need to propogate through through to symmetry parts.
Changed VehicleEditor, When a part is grabbed, push-pull translation is now behind control-scroll wheel so it doesn't interfere with camers movement.
Changed VehicleEditor, Selecting a gizmo drops grabbed part.
Changed VehicleEditor, Spawning a new part disables gizmos

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Added KeyframeAnimation context menu option when in vehicle editor.

Added update of KeyframAnimations in the vehicle editor. Users can now run animations in the vehicle editor and deployable parts - eg: solar panels can now be deployed/retracted in the vehicle editor.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Added Currently Grabbed part in VehicleEditor can now by rotated 90degrees using pitch/yaw/roll editor keys (WSADQE).
Added HotKeys for Place, Translate, Rotate and Scale Modes. (alphanumeric 1-4).
Added reset rotation Key (spaceBar) in Vehicle editor. Resets Rotation of currently grabbed or currently selected part.

commits.author: JoshRW
lines: Clean up coding style for glint code
Remove redundant comments in glint code

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Added Enable Symmetry inheritance Hotkey.
Changed Enabling Symmetry inheritance resets symmetry state.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Added 1st pass in inferring Snapping and Connecting behaviour. For now all parts allow face snapping, this can be disabled in the xml data on a per part basis. Parts that have connections authored will allow connecting.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Changed VehicleEditor Gizmo interactions are now click-and-hold rather than single click.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Added a box to enclose the vehicle editor so it feels more like a building. Currently just a grey box with some lights around the edges as a placeholder.
Turned off sun lighting in the editor. I still need to turn off the lens flare that leaks in from time to time.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Added RotationSnapping to VehicleEditor. When snapping is enabled rotations are snapped to 15degree increments.

commits.author: Dan Southon
lines: Changed thumbnail viewing angle.
Fixed stale dynamic thumbnail flicker when quickly hovering between parts.
Changed dynamic thumbnail rendering to poll fences instead of blocking the frame.
Added fallback to static thumbnails if dynamic thumbnail rendering fails.
Added blank button fallback if static thumbnail does not exist.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Changed Increased Lighting intensity and disabled shadow casting for VehicleEditor Lighting.

commits.author: Dan Southon
lines: Added an early exit to the Milky Way shader if the luminance is below a threshold. This cuts work for anything outside of the milky way band.
Added fastAtan2 to MathCommon.glsl
Converted Milky Way shader to use fastAtan2
Lowered gpu registers for Milky Way shader's cloudNoise, by returning a float instead of a vec3.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Re-introduced rolling resistance into the Bepu physics integrator. This should help bodies settle down in to the landed state much more quickly.
Fixed error where bodies in the ocean would often fail to go into the floating (off-rails) state.
Set terrain contact using Bepu collision detection rather than the rough method we used previously.
Removed accidental sampling of the ocean renderer for bodies with no ocean, like the Moon.
Changed the Situation enum to be an actual bitfield vs having hand-curated state changes. This allows us to track terrain and ocean contact independently.
Added two new states for being on the seabed: Dragging and Bottomed.
Shrunk various enum types to smaller bit widths where appropriate.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Moved gravitation computation into the environment struct.
Renamed BubbleOrigin.ReadOnlyParent to Parent.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Added part highlighting support when hovering over list items in the Resources UI Window.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Changed NoFaceSnapping to use EditorTag system.
Fixed Capsules,Engines, interstages were able to face snap.
Fixed 2 way symmetry was disbaled.

commits.author: JoshRW
lines: Add glints to Rocket and Gemini7 vehicles.

commits.author: JoshRW
lines: Fix bug where non-kitten vehicle glints weren't being applied from XML.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Changed VehicleEditor, Capsules Tab is first selected tab in PartsWindow.
Changed VehicleEditor, First selected part is auto-placed.
Fixed A vehicle parts tab was getting created for parts with the NoFaceSnapping tag.

commits.author: Morrow-RW
lines: Editor translation gizmo now applies across symmetries.

commits.author: Morrow-RW
lines: Editor rotation gizmo now applies across symmetries.

commits.author: Morrow-RW
lines: Cleaned up some old code in VehicleEditor

commits.author: Morrow-RW
lines: Imported open/close animation for CoreServiceModuleA_Prefab_SetAHeightA.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Changed swapped out VehicleEditor imgui text buttons for Image buttons (Icons are placeholder).
Added Confirmation pop-up for new vehicle button in vehicle editor.
Changed Hid Stage window in Vehicle editor to avoid confusion with Sequence window. It can be reopened via the editor file menu if needed.
Changed default location and size of sequence window in VehicleEditor.
Changed Vehicle Editor, enabled Connector typing for engines.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Changed When opening VehicleEditor, the camera now snaps immediatly to the correct view position and rotation.
Changed when there are no active parts in the Vehicle Editor the camera is locked to the start position and rotation.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Improved drag and timestep calculations to be stable at higher values of time warp. This should prevent oceans and dense atmospheres from becoming light speed cannons.
Check for collision _before_ finalizing our overall timestep to avoid taking enormous numbers of Bepu timesteps at high time warp.
Prevent changing physics bubbles or the creation of a terrain patch from waking up a sleeping vehicle.
Don't overwrite high-quality on-rails positions with low-quality physics bubble positions.
Fixed many cases of conflating the origin frame with the vehicle situation.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Added EditorDelete Key (default Delete). Deletes currently grabbed part(s).

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Added initial Ambient Occlusion implementation to vehicles. This uses FidelityFX's Combined Adaptive Compute Ambient Occlusion implementation (CACAO). The current setup uses the depth pre pass output and internally approximates the normals. CACAO does have support for explicitly providing normals instead of recreating them from the depth image, however this needs to be investigated further.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Changed Moved Parts window over to the right side of the vehicle editor window and laid it out vertically.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Prevent mixing of vehicles in different reference frames to avoid a plethora of issues where terrain-focued code would unexpectedly be in CCI.

commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Updated ground clutter collision generator to match the refactored procedural modifiers.
Removed unused functions from ground clutter generation.
Merged duplicated modifier code in ProceduralModifiers.comp.

commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Fixed biome data and biome material buffers not being populated with a dummy material for planets without terrain. This may fix a crash on AMD.

commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Fixed ground clutter collision generation binding the wrong procedural modifiers pipeline.
Fixed ground clutter collision frame resources not being disposed.
Reduced number of cells preallocated for ground clutter collision from 2048 to 128. Eventually this will be replaced by dynamically growing the number of cells as more are required.
Cleaned up ground clutter collision data code and removed commented out code.

commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Fixed missing BVH indices buffer in FinalizeGenerate.comp if ray queries are unsupported.

commits.author: JoshRW
lines: Add auto-generated glint curves for all vehicles
Set auto-generated glint curve to be selected by default
Regenerate glints on vehicle edit or new vehicle creation. The debug glint editor is still in it's place in case people want to manually edit glint curves.
Tidy glint xml indents

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Changed Vehicle Editor. Only valid parts are allowed to be a root part (i.e. first part placed).
Changed VehiceEditor block right click context menu for grabbed parts.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Fixed teleport giving the wrong state time for the next frame, thus triggering a time mismatch error.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Increased motionless energy threshold to help vehicles settle a bit better.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Applied Ambient Occlusion to kittens. They were previously already included in the AO pass as they render into the depth pre pass, now they recieve that AO aswell.
Added option to disable AO per instance on characters. The kittens head and fur were causing artifacts when recieving AO as each fur shell would affect the AO output.
Cleaned up Ambient Occlusion renderer.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Changed VehicleEditor, Parts are now rotated around the point of connection to the parent, rather than around the parts origin.

commits.author: MattCaradusRW
lines: Added VehicleEditor, Face Snapped Parts will now snap to 15Degree increments if angle snapping is enabled.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Removed dependency between prepass renderer and ambient occlusion renderer.
Ambient occlusion renderer is now static.

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketWerkz
lines: Added Ground Impact events to vehicle worker tasks and populate with ground impact data.
Added application of ground impact events to spawn ground impact particles.

Turned on the ground impact particle effects again. Now with Bepu contacts. This is step 1. They still are bugged - they have no gravity being applied and they are following the vehicle. But fixing those issues is next up.

commits.author: Maxwell Johnson
lines: Added quality settings to ambient occlusion. These are using the built in quality functions provided by CACAO. These settings may need to be reviewed after further tweaking the AO settings.
Minor tweaks to the ambient occlusion settings.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Fixed thread worker origin and kinematic states not being initialized on construction, which could matter in edge cases where vehicles were reconfigured during vehicle update task finalization.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Moved leader origin swap logic to when vehicles are removed from tasks to avoid missing cases.
Fixed error where vehicle instance was being compared to a string.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Moved the guts of DockingPort.Dock() into Vehicle.MergeFrom().
Pushed the part-specific logic into Part.Connector.ConnectAndMerge() so it can be reused.
